steps:
- task: PowerShell@2
  displayName: Validate proxy parameters
  inputs:
    targetType: 'inline'
    script: |
      $pipelineNoProxy = "$env:PIPELINE_NO_PROXY"
      $functionNoProxy = "$env:FUNCTION_NO_PROXY"

      if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($pipelineNoProxy)) {
        throw "Pipeline noProxy parameter is empty. Check PipelineNoProxy variable in the selected backend variable group."
      }

      if ($pipelineNoProxy -like '$(*') {
        throw "Pipeline noProxy parameter was not resolved. Check that PipelineNoProxy exists in the selected backend variable group."
      }

      if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($functionNoProxy)) {
        throw "FunctionNoProxy parameter is empty. Check FunctionNoProxy variable in the selected backend variable group."
      }

      if ($functionNoProxy -like '$(*') {
        throw "FunctionNoProxy parameter was not resolved. Check that FunctionNoProxy exists in the selected backend variable group."
      }

      Write-Host "Proxy parameters provided."
  env:
    PIPELINE_NO_PROXY: ${{ parameters.noProxy }}
    FUNCTION_NO_PROXY: ${{ parameters.functionNoProxy }}

- template: ../proxy-configure.yml
  parameters:
    noProxy: ${{ parameters.noProxy }}
